pairs.q: what would encourage good staff to remain
pairs.note: 整个问题部分被替换为'what motivates employees'，核心是'what motivates'对应'what would encourage'。

paraphrase.trap: 题干中的'good staff'可能被误解为'good employees'，但原文没有直接出现'good'，而是用'employees'泛指员工。
paraphrase.explain: 先抓题干关键词'encourage good staff to remain'（鼓励好员工留下），到原文找同义表达'motivates employees'（激励员工），同时注意'need to know'对应'requires an understanding'。

items.prompt: The actions of managers may make staff feel they shouldn’t move to a different employer.

pairs.q: make staff feel they shouldn’t move to a different employer
pairs.p: feel more obligated to stay with the company
pairs.note: 题干说‘不应该换雇主’，原文说‘更有义务留在公司’，意思相同。

pairs.p: when managers provide recognition to employees, motivate employees to work together, and remove obstacles preventing effective performance
pairs.note: 题干用‘actions’概括，原文具体列出管理者的三种行为。

paraphrase.trap: 题干中的‘shouldn’t move’可能被误认为‘禁止离开’，但原文是‘feel more obligated’（感到有义务），是心理感受而非强制。
paraphrase.explain: 先抓题干关键词‘make staff feel they shouldn’t move’，到原文找‘feel more obligated to stay’这一同义表达，再确认主语‘managers’的行为对应。

items.prompt: Little is done in the hospitality industry to help workers improve their skills.
Staff are less likely to change jobs if cooperation is encouraged.

pairs.p: feel more obligated to stay with the company
pairs.note: 题干说'不太可能换工作'，原文说'更有义务留在公司'，意思相同，但表达方式不同。
题干说'鼓励合作'，原文说'激励员工一起工作'，是同一意思的不同说法。

paraphrase.trap: 题干中的'cooperation'可能被误认为与原文中的'recognition'或'remove obstacles'对应，但实际对应的是'motivate employees to work together'。
paraphrase.explain: 先抓题干关键词'less likely to change jobs'和'cooperation is encouraged'，到原文找表达类似意思的句子，发现'feel more obligated to stay with the company'和'motivate employees to work together'与之对应。

items.prompt: Dissatisfaction with pay is not the only reason why hospitality workers change jobs.

pairs.note: 题干中的‘对薪酬不满’对应原文的‘低薪酬’，是同义替换。

pairs.p: Among the many cited reasons are
pairs.note: 题干说‘不是唯一原因’，原文说‘在众多被引用的原因中包括’，句式不同但意思一致。

pairs.p: low compensation, inadequate benefits, poor working conditions and compromised employee morale and attitudes
pairs.note: 题干概括为‘换工作原因’，原文列举了多个具体原因，属于概括与具体的替换。

paraphrase.trap: 注意题干中的‘not the only reason’可能误导学生找‘唯一原因’，但原文是列举多个原因，需理解整体意思。
paraphrase.explain: 先抓题干关键词‘Dissatisfaction with pay’和‘not the only reason’，到原文找‘low compensation’和‘Among the many cited reasons’，即可定位。

questions.title: Questions 32–35
instructions: Do the following statements agree with the claims of the writer in Reading Passage 3?
In boxes 32–35 on your answer sheet, write
YES if the statement agrees with the claims of the writer
NO if the statement contradicts the claims of the writer
NOT GIVEN if it is impossible to say what the writer thinks about this

items.prompt: One reason for high staff turnover in the hospitality industry is poor morale.
Research has shown that staff have a tendency to dislike their workplace.

pairs.q: staff have a tendency to dislike their workplace
pairs.p: a predisposition to view their work environment negatively
pairs.note: 题干说员工有不喜欢工作场所的倾向，原文说有一种消极看待工作环境的倾向，意思相同。

pairs.p: no evidence exists to support this hypothesis
pairs.note: 题干说研究表明，原文说没有证据支持，反向表达，所以答案是NO。

paraphrase.trap: 可能误选YES，因为原文提到'seems likely'，但后面用'no evidence'否定了。
paraphrase.explain: 先抓题干关键词'dislike their workplace'和'Research has shown'，到原文找对应。原文有'predisposition to view negatively'对应'dislike'，但'no evidence'否定研究支持，所以选NO。

items.prompt: An improvement in working conditions and job security makes staff satisfied with their jobs.

pairs.q: An improvement in working conditions and job security makes staff satisfied with their jobs
pairs.p: just fulfilling these needs does not result in satisfaction
pairs.note: 题干说改善工作条件和安全感会让员工满意，原文说满足这些需求（即改善条件）不会带来满意，直接否定。

paraphrase.trap: 可能误以为原文提到'减少不满'就是满意，但原文明确说不会带来满意。
paraphrase.explain: 先抓题干关键词'improvement in working conditions and job security'和'satisfied'，到原文找对应，发现原文说'fulfilling these needs does not result in satisfaction'，与题干相反，所以选NO。

items.prompt: Staff should be allowed to choose when they take breaks during the working day.

pairs.note: 题干说'选择何时休息'，原文说'允许充足的休息'，未提及选择权，属于句式改写但意思不完全一致。

paraphrase.trap: 题干中的'choose when'（选择何时）在原文中没有对应，原文只提到'adequate breaks'（充足的休息），并未说明员工可以自行选择时间，因此属于未提及信息。
paraphrase.explain: 先抓题干关键词'choose when'和'breaks'，到原文找'breaks'，发现原文只提到'adequate breaks'，没有'choose'的含义，因此判断为NOT GIVEN。

questions.title: Questions 36–40
instructions: Choose ONE WORD ONLY from the passage for each answer.
Write your answers in boxes 36–40 on your answer sheet.

items.prompt: Tews, Michel and Stafford carried out research on staff in an American chain of 36 ____ .

pairs.p: chain of themed restaurants in the United States
pairs.note: 题干中的'American chain of'对应原文中的'chain of themed restaurants in the United States'，其中'themed restaurants'是具体类型，而'United States'替换了'American'。

paraphrase.trap: 可能误填'themed restaurants'，但题干空格前已有'chain of'，所以只需填'restaurants'。
paraphrase.explain: 先抓题干中的'American chain of'，到原文找'chain of ... in the United States'，发现'restaurants'是答案。

items.prompt: They discovered that activities designed for staff to have fun improved their 37 ____ ,

pairs.note: 题干用'improved'表示改善，原文用'favorable impact on'表示积极影响，是句式改写。

pairs.q: activities designed for staff to have fun
pairs.note: 题干描述为'为员工设计的趣味活动'，原文简化为'fun activities'，是同义替换。
答案'performance'在原文中直接出现，是原词复现。

paraphrase.trap: 注意题干中'improved their 37 ____'，原文是'favorable impact on performance'，不要误填'turnover'，因为'turnover'是另一个影响对象。
paraphrase.explain: 先抓题干关键词'fun activities'和'improved'，到原文找'fun activities'和'favorable impact on'，定位到'performance'。

items.prompt: and that management involvement led to lower staff 38 ____ .

pairs.note: 题干中的'management involvement'对应原文中的'manager support for fun'，都是指管理层的参与或支持。
题干中的'led to lower staff'（导致员工...降低）对应原文中的'reducing'（减少），表达相同含义。
题干中的'turnover'与原文中的'turnover'完全一致，是定位的关键词。

paraphrase.explain: 先抓住题干中的关键词'turnover'和'management involvement'，到原文中找到'turnover'和'manager support for fun'，发现'management involvement'被替换为'manager support for fun'，'led to lower staff'被替换为'reducing'，从而定位答案。

items.prompt: They also found that the activities needed to fit with both the company’s 39 ____ and the ... of the staff.

pairs.note: company's 和 organizational 都表示‘公司的’，是同义替换。
fit with 和 aligned with 都表示‘与……一致/匹配’，是同义替换。
题干中的空格对应原文中的 goals，是原词复现。

paraphrase.trap: 注意题干中的‘the ... of the staff’对应原文的‘employee characteristics’，但空格处需要填的是与‘company's’搭配的名词，不要误填‘characteristics’。
paraphrase.explain: 先抓题干关键词‘company's’和‘fit with’，到原文找对应的‘organizational’和‘aligned with’，然后定位到‘goals’即为答案。

items.prompt: They also found that the activities needed to fit with both the company’s ... and the 40 ____ of the staff.

pairs.q: the activities needed to fit with both the company’s ... and the 40 ____ of the staff
pairs.p: aligned with both organizational goals and employee characteristics
pairs.note: 题干说活动需要与公司目标和员工特征相契合，原文说乐趣的设定必须与组织目标和员工特征相契合，句式不同但意思相同。
fit with 与 aligned with 都表示“与……一致/相契合”，是同义替换。
题干中的“公司目标”对应原文的“组织目标”，是同义替换。
staff 与 employee 都指员工，是同义替换。

paraphrase.trap: 注意题干中空格前是“the 40 ____ of the staff”，原文对应的是“employee characteristics”，所以答案应为characteristics，而不是其他词如goals。
paraphrase.explain: 先抓题干关键词“fit with both the company’s ... and the ... of the staff”，到原文找“aligned with both organizational goals and employee characteristics”，发现对应关系，从而确定答案。
